arts.sum: A Premier League side with a new manager and a new style - a back three, attacking wing-backs and a pair of No 10s behind the front man.

Alejandro Garnacho has been linked with a move to Premier League rivals Chelsea throughout the winter transfer window. arts.sum: football.london understands Crystal Palace have made a move to sign Chilwell on loan from Chelsea prior to the transfer deadline . Carney Chukwuemeka is another player who ideally needs to depart Stamford Bridge prior to the transfer deadline due to a lack of football this season.

arts.ttl: Chelsea defender Disasi set for pre-deadline loan move
arts.sum: Axel Disasi is among the players expected to leave Chelsea on loan before tonight’s transfer deadline. Tottenham and Aston Villa are among clubs interested in the defender, who has made just six Premier League appearances this season. arts.ttl: How Graham Potter came back stronger from Chelsea 'washing machine'
arts.sum: Graham Potter is back at Chelsea tonight as West Ham's new head coach and his reflections on short and tricky time at Stamford Bridge have taught him to improve
